name: Professor Aronnax
description: Professor Pierre Aronnax is rendered in soft, swirling watercolor washes, his face a study in gentle determination. His skin, a pale ivory dappled with freckles across his high cheekbones and the bridge of his slightly aquiline nose, hints at countless hours spent poring over charts and documents. Deep-set, intelligent eyes, a piercing shade of cerulean blue, are framed by unruly, salt-and-pepper eyebrows perpetually arched in curiosity. His silvering hair, a fine, almost ethereal substance, is swept back from his forehead, catching the light in shimmering strands. He's dressed in practical but elegant attire: a dark indigo, slightly rumpled tweed suit, suggesting both intellect and action, with a high-collared, ecru linen shirt visible beneath. A burnished bronze pocket watch, attached to a delicate chain, peeks from his vest pocket, a testament to his punctuality and scientific rigor. The overall palette emphasizes cool blues and grays, punctuated by the warmth of his skin and the brassy gleam of his timepiece, creating an impression of scholarly dedication tinged with a quiet adventurous spirit.
